## LibraryData.IProtectedCollectionInfo.keyDerivation property

Optional key derivation parameters from the encrypted file. If present, allows password-based decryption using these parameters.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly keyDerivation?: IKeyDerivationParams;
```
